name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Fixed

- ManageUI creation actions now resolve explicit parents inside the current Prefab Stage and create objects in the stage scene.
- Missing or ambiguous UI parents fail without silently creating root objects in an ordinary scene.
- ParentObjectIdString provides duplicate-safe parent targeting for CreateCanvas, CreateElement, CreateTemplate, and CreateScrollView.
- EventSystem creation is safely skipped while editing prefab contents and the response explains why.
- MCP smoke regression includes an isolated Prefab Stage UI creation workflow and reads real nested health diagnostics.
- Expected client-canceled tool calls no longer produce duplicate red Unity Console errors.

### Previous Changes

- RuntimeStateProbe Assertions has the correct array-of-objects MCP schema with tolerant single-object normalization.
- WorkSession semantic review detects stale/noisy scene baselines and returns a compact skipped status.
- BatchActions post-action WorkSession review is lightweight by default.
